title: The influencer racing to save Thailand's most endangered sea mammal
description: Amateur conservationist and social media influencer Theerasak 'Pop' Saksritawee has a rare bond with Thailand's critically endangered dugongs.
author: Mailee Osten-Tan, Nicolas Axelrod
body:
Thailand's dugongs are on the brink of extinction, but one man has dedicated his life to saving them.

Amateur conservationist Pop Saksritawee first encountered dugongs while snorkelling off the coast of Trang province. He was immediately captivated by the gentle, slow-moving creatures.
